notes: Lesson 2 Part 1 (act 10, "Prior filters the population", 278.42s, 14 cues rescaled to real MP3). Reusable Bayes idioms from manim/bayes.py (PopGrid, prior_tree, bayes_spine, posterior_ratio). Two review iterations: round-1 authored+rendered all 14; round-2 fixed Cue04 (stray test+ chip overlapping Healthy branch, removed) and Cue10 ("a label - not an explanation" clipping the right frame edge -> repositioned below the name chip and added to safe-area guard). Per-cue checklist (formula legibility+correctness, highlighted element matches narration, contrast, nothing off-frame/overlapping, chunk timing): all pass. Chunk timing verified in render log: every cue within pinning tolerance, final 278.54s vs audio 278.42s Δ0.12s (<0.5s). Concrete model stated in Cue06: 100 people, prior 1%, sensitivity 99%, specificity 95% -> 1 TP + ~5 FP -> posterior ~17%.
